name: wechat-aibot
description: Windows local WeChat AI bot powered by Claude Code or Codex

scripts.check: node --check bot.mjs && node -e "const {readdirSync}=require('node:fs');const {execFileSync}=require('node:child_process');for (const dir of ['lib','static']) for (const file of readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.endsWith(dir==='lib'?'.mjs':'.js'))) execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',`${dir}/${file}`],{stdio:'inherit'});"
